Patent infringement claim filed by PharmaCorp against GenericLabs.
Asserted patent covers a method of manufacturing drug compound X-27.
Case filed in Eastern District of Texas, Judge Brown presiding.
Markman hearing scheduled in 6 months. Discovery opens next quarter.
Estimated 18-month timeline through trial.
Potential damages: $50M-$200M.
Plaintiff seeking preliminary injunction to halt GenericLabs' manufacturing.
